office_does: The assessor administers taxable-property valuation and records under state law.
race_blurb: Longtime incumbent Gabriel Spencer faces county-government veteran Cora Moser.

candidates.summary: Paralegal and county-government employee emphasizing transparent valuations, access, and a homestead exemption.
highlights: Has eight years in county government [S2]
Advocates for a state homestead exemption [S2]

taxes.basis: A homestead exemption would reduce covered property-tax burdens.

experience.basis: Eight years in county government establish a substantial relevant institutional record.

candidates.summary: Incumbent assessor emphasizing data-based valuation, clear appeals, and a larger business-property exemption.
highlights: Supports increasing the business personal-property exemption [S2]

taxes.basis: Increasing the exemption would reduce covered business property-tax burdens.

experience.basis: Roughly 20 years as incumbent assessor support the maximal proven-record pole.
